# Code RED Decompiled Source Export
# Source: related_apps/code_red_sccl_attempt_bundle_v1/code_red_sccl_windows_build_kit_v1/compile_vehicle_menu_probe_windows.bat
# SHA1: e9f5379c00fa5520e40bab5bdc21f06cdc660f2b
# Export type: source/text copy

@echo off
setlocal ENABLEDELAYEDEXPANSION

set "KIT_DIR=%~dp0"
for %%I in ("%KIT_DIR%..") do set "BUNDLE_DIR=%%~fI"
set "LAB_DIR=%BUNDLE_DIR%\code_red_script_compile_lab_v1"
set "OUT_DIR=%KIT_DIR%output\vehicle_menu_probe_build"
set "LOG_DIR=%KIT_DIR%output"
set "LOG_FILE=%LOG_DIR%\compile_vehicle_menu_probe.log"

if not exist "%LOG_DIR%" mkdir "%LOG_DIR%" >nul 2>nul

echo ==== Code RED RDR vehicle menu probe compile ==== > "%LOG_FILE%"
echo KIT_DIR=%KIT_DIR%>> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo LAB_DIR=%LAB_DIR%>> "%LOG_FILE%"

echo Detecting SC-CL.exe...>> "%LOG_FILE%"
set "SCCL_EXE="
for %%P in (
  "%KIT_DIR%output\SC-CL.exe"
  "%KIT_DIR%SC-CL.exe"
  "%BUNDLE_DIR%\SC-CL.exe"
) do (
  if exist "%%~fP" set "SCCL_EXE=%%~fP"
)

if not defined SCCL_EXE (
  echo SC-CL.exe not found. Running robust SC-CL build/detect helper...
  echo SC-CL.exe not found. Running build helper...>> "%LOG_FILE%"
  call "%KIT_DIR%build_sccl_windows.bat" "%~1"
  for %%P in (
    "%KIT_DIR%output\SC-CL.exe"
    "%KIT_DIR%SC-CL.exe"
    "%BUNDLE_DIR%\SC-CL.exe"
  ) do (
    if exist "%%~fP" set "SCCL_EXE=%%~fP"
  )
)

if not defined SCCL_EXE (
  echo ERROR: SC-CL.exe not found even after robust build/detect helper.
  echo Easiest fix: put SC-CL-master.zip in this same folder as this BAT, or run:
  echo   compile_vehicle_menu_probe_windows.bat C:\full\path\to\SC-CL-master.zip
  echo ERROR: missing SC-CL.exe>> "%LOG_FILE%"
  exit /b 1
)

set "SRC_FILE=%LAB_DIR%\src\main.c"
set "INCLUDE_DIR=%LAB_DIR%\include"

if not exist "%SRC_FILE%" (
  echo ERROR: %SRC_FILE% not found.
  echo ERROR: source file missing>> "%LOG_FILE%"
  exit /b 1
)

mkdir "%OUT_DIR%" >nul 2>nul

echo Using compiler: %SCCL_EXE%>> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo Source: %SRC_FILE%>> "%LOG_FILE%"
echo Include: %INCLUDE_DIR%>> "%LOG_FILE%"

call "%SCCL_EXE%" ^
  -target=RDR_#SC ^
  -platform=X360 ^
  -name=codered_vehicle_menu_probe ^
  -out-dir="%OUT_DIR%" ^
  -extra-arg=-I"%INCLUDE_DIR%" ^
  "%SRC_FILE%" >> "%LOG_FILE%" 2>&1

if errorlevel 1 (
  echo ERROR: Vehicle menu probe compile failed.
  echo See log: %LOG_FILE%
  exit /b 1
)

echo.
echo Vehicle menu probe compile finished. Check output here:
echo   %OUT_DIR%
echo Log:
echo   %LOG_FILE%
exit /b 0
